title: Printer and Bluetooth Issues
drDigitalIntro: Printer won't print: make sure it's turned on and connected, restart both printer and Mac, check if it's set as default printer. Bluetooth device won't connect: restart both devices, re-pair them in System Settings > Bluetooth, make sure the device is charged. Devices disconnect randomly: they might be too far away, or low battery.
drDigitalHint: Always restart both the Mac and the device first.
